text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ugh, you dummy! Apologizing won't fix anything!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Take this experience as a lesson so you can do
better next time for your king. Understand?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. But don't you worry. A tiny failure like this
won't get me down. A first-rate Umamusume
knows how to rebound!
